problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
